  - 1.1.0 | 2026-04-26 | Embedded 2 screenshots (My Approval all + PO tab)
---

# Step 01 — My Approval Dashboard (FC View)

**Persona:** FC (Financial Controller)
**Module:** 1
**Section:** 1.1
**Route:** `/procurement/approval?filter=doc_type%3Apo`

---

## 1.1 Access Path

1. Log in as `fc@zebra.com`
2. Navigate to **Procurement → My Approval** in the left sidebar
3. Click the **Purchase Order** filter tab to show only PO approvals

---

## 1.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> list["2. PO Detail — View Mode"]
    list --> edit["3. Edit Mode — Approval Actions"]
    edit --> done(["PO Approved / Returned / Rejected"])
    style myapproval fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.3 Screen Layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  My Approval                                                   │
│  Review and approve pending procurement requests.              │
│                                                                │
│  [🔍 Search...]                                                │
│                                                                │
│  ┌──────────────┐ ┌────────────────┐ ┌─────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Total Pending│ │Purchase Request│ │  Purchase Order     │  │
│  │     14       │ │       7        │ │       7  ← active  │  │
│  └──────────────┘ └────────────────┘ └─────────────────────┘  │
│  ┌───────────────────┐                                         │
│  │ Store Requisition │                                         │
│  │       0           │                                         │
│  └───────────────────┘                                         │
│                                                                │
│  # │ Document       │ Type │ Date       │ Status              │
│  ──┼────────────────┼──────┼────────────┼─────────────────── │
│  1 │ PO20260300002  │ [PO] │ 2026-03-24 │ DRAFT               │
│  2 │ PO20260300020  │ [PO] │ 2026-03-24 │ DRAFT               │
│  3 │ PO20260400018  │ [PO] │ 2026-04-08 │ IN PROGRESS         │
│  4 │ PO20260300048  │ [PO] │ 2026-03-19 │ IN PROGRESS         │
│  5 │ PO20260400024  │ [PO] │ 2026-04-08 │ IN PROGRESS         │
│  6 │ PO20260300014  │ [PO] │ 2026-03-24 │ IN PROGRESS         │
│  7 │ PO20260300016  │ [PO] │ 2026-03-24 │ DRAFT               │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

![My Approval — All Documents view](data:image/png;base64,)

![My Approval — Purchase Order tab filtered (7 POs)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.4 Filter Tabs

| Tab | Count | What it shows |
|-----|-------|---------------|
| Total Pending | 14 | All document types requiring FC action |
| Purchase Request | 7 | PRs pending FC approval |
| **Purchase Order** | **7** | POs pending FC approval ← active in this step |
| Store Requisition | 0 | SRs pending FC approval |

---

## 1.5 Table Columns

| Column | Description | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| # | Sequential row number | Resets with filter |
| Document | PO number as clickable link | Navigates to PO detail |
| Type | Document type badge | Orange "PO" badge |
| Date | PO creation date | YYYY-MM-DD format |
| Status | Current PO status | DRAFT (grey) or IN PROGRESS (yellow/gold) |

---

## 1.6 Status Values in My Approval

| Status | Badge Color | Description |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| DRAFT | Grey | PO created but not yet submitted by purchaser |
| IN PROGRESS | Yellow/Gold | PO submitted, pending FC approval |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** DRAFT POs appear in the FC's My Approval queue even though they have not been submitted for approval. FC can enter edit mode on DRAFT POs. This appears to be by design (FC has visibility of all POs in their queue regardless of status), but the BRD does not document this behavior.

---

## 1.7 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click PO number link | Step 02 — PO Detail (view mode) |
| Click Purchase Request tab | PR approval list |
| Click Total Pending tab | All pending documents |
| Search box | Filters list by PO number |

---

## 1.8 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | FC sees all POs assigned to their workflow step | FC role configuration |
| BR-02 | PO number links navigate to PO detail page | FR-PO-001 |
| BR-03 | My Approval aggregates PR, PO, and SR approval queues | Approval module design |

---

## 1.9 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| FC has 0 pending POs | Purchase Order tab shows count 0; table is empty |
| PO is DRAFT in queue | FC can view and enter edit mode; approval actions not available on items |
| Search with no match | Empty table; pagination shows "Showing 0 of 0" |
| PO removed from queue (approved by another user) | Removed from list on next refresh |
| FC clicks a PO from another property | PO detail loads; fields reflect that property's data |
| Pagination: more than 10 POs | Pagination controls appear; default 10 rows per page |

---

## 1.10 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/approval?filter=doc_type:po` | Fetch FC's PO approval queue |
| GET | `/api/procurement/approval/stats` | Fetch tab counts (Total, PR, PO, SR) |
